fields.name: User Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user name that represents your company's login to the OCR service.

fields.name: Sign-up URL
fields.tooltip: Specifies the web page where you sign up for the OCR service.

fields.name: Service URL
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the OCR service. The service specified in the Service URL field is called when you send and receive files for OCR.

fields.name: Sign-in URL
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sign-in page for the OCR service. This is the web page where you enter your company's user name, password, and authorization key to sign in to the service.

fields.name: Customer Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies your company's name at the provider of the OCR service.

fields.name: Customer ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies your company's customer ID at the provider of the OCR service.

fields.name: Customer Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies your company's status at the provider of the OCR service.

fields.name: Default OCR Doc. Template
fields.tooltip: Specifies the OCR template that must be used by default for electronic documents that are received from the OCR service. You can change the OCR template on the individual incoming document card before sending the related file to the OCR service.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the service is enabled.

fields.name: Master Data Sync Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether or not the master data sync has been enabled.

fields.name: Master Data Last Sync
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last time when the master data was synched.
